title: Level Up, Tiny King! Demo
description: Level Up, Tiny King! is a solo survivors-like auto-shooter platformer. After being kidnapped and thrown into the dungeons, you must fight your way upward. Survive relentless waves of cute enemies while climbing. Grow stronger, recruit magical buddies, and reclaim your throne.

title: Miniature LAND -Four Seasons- Demo
description: An escape room adventure set in a handcrafted miniature world. Can you find your way back home?

title: Summer Coming (夏天来了)  Demo
description: Summer Coming is a heartwarming pixel-story game that transports you back to university days, where you’ll experience a summer filled with friendship, budding romance, and personal growth. Through free exploration, interactive choices, and playful mini-games, you can write your own chapter of youth.

title: RETRIEVAL Demo
description: RETRIEVAL is a first-person psychological horror game where you explore a looping house, collect scattered memory fragments, and search extracted keywords in an old computer terminal to uncover a tragic truth.

title: Medieval Tavern Simulator Demo
description: Transform a run down tavern into the region's most popular gathering spot. Serve beer, manage your customers, and expand your business. Increase your profits while protecting your reputation, because every night brings new opportunities, surprises, and a touch of chaos to your doorstep.

title: BIBI DICE Demo
description: Roll eight dice, build scoring hands, stack multipliers, collect relics, and defeat enemies in a compact desktop portrait dice-building roguelite.

title: Van Tich Legends Demo
description: VẠN TÍCH LEGENDS DEMO IS OFFICIALLY OUT ON STEAM!Are you ready to rewrite Vietnamese fairy tales in the most intense and epic way possible? The official Demo of Vạn Tích Legends is now available on Steam (PC)! Step onto the fiery battlefield of mythical gods!What’s waiting for you in this Demo?

title: 黯渊崛起 Demo
description: 这是一款RPG刷宝冒险游戏，内容丰富，多职业多次转职和觉醒成长、门派势力选择、宠物进化培养、宝石镶嵌——构建专属的深渊冒险。 几百种装备和独特道具自由搭配自由冒险，数百种技能机制各异玩法丰富，大量新的冒险地图等你来探索。

title: Agrocracy Demo
description: A farming management game focused on planning and numbers. This is not a farming sim - no driving, animals, or role-playing. Manage weather, labor, capital, and time on a large isometric map.

title: The Quiet After Demo
description: You play Ava, a would-be adventurer whose guild registration is only the first step into something far more dangerous, on the road ahead and beneath her own skin. A psychological, choice-driven visual novel where every decision shapes who she becomes.

title: Death's Life 2 Demo
description: In this demo you can try a physics-based puzzle game where you play as Death, creating “accidental” deaths through chain reactions. Solve scenarios in multiple ways or survive and escape from deadly trap-filled environments.

title: Scrap Isle Demo
description: Scrap-Isle is a short, incremental game where you sell trash to make loads of money, you earn levels and increase your trash production while fighting off enemies that want to take your trash from you, you can even hatch a variety of helpers to automate your money production!

title: TimelineTown-タイムラインタウン Demo
description: Invite friends to TimelineTown and grow your SNS together! Enjoy a relaxing sandbox-style simulation where numbers keep rising and new features unlock as your SNS levels up. Create trends, chat, and make posts go viral!

title: Arc Salvo Demo
description: Arc Salvo is a fast-paced online turn-based artillery game featuring explosive team battles, a growing arsenal, and deep character customization.

title: The Murder Of Yesterday Demo
description: A psychological horror crime experience featuring Story mode and Anomaly mode. Where time is your only weapon.. travel back through fractured moments to stop a brutal crime before it happens uncover the truth, alter the outcome, and face the consequences of changing fate in a haunting reality.

title: SYSTEM_REBOOT Demo
description: Dive into the heart of a compromised mainframe in this psychological, meta-narrative bullet heaven. You are the Icarus Protocol, an advanced system cleaner tasked with purging catastrophic malware. But as the glitches intensify you'll soon realize that this is far more than just a simple simulation.

title: SHADE WALKERS Demo
description: A 2v2v2 horror escape royale set in a haunted school. Team up with your partner, gather ritual dolls, use items, avoid deadly entities, and outplay rival duos. Only one team can escape.

title: Gems are Mine, Slashes are Yours: Blood & Blessing Demo
description: A fast-paced 2D survival action roguelike where you bleed to fight, and she complains while healing. Consume your HP to smash through endless hordes, survive extreme resource swaps with a greedy AI cleric, and work a second job hunting bounties to pay for your skills!

title: Arcana, Gas & Waterworks Inc. Demo
description: The full set of game features through the first six levels of your fantasy utility career.

title: Travelling Home: Ever After Demo
description: Own a moving castle! A full-screen ambient idle game with built-in productivity tools. Travel a charming world in your train house. The perfect companion for study, work, creation, and sleep.

title: Streets of Miami VR Demo
description: Streets of Miami VR is a gritty 1980s crime-action VR game where you fight, drive, spray paint, shoot, hustle for money, and survive the streets of Miami in a open world sand box experience built for physical VR gameplay.

title: Dice Tech Dominion - Enter the Shadow Circuit Demo
description: Build your dice deck, shape the dungeon board, and command monsters in a 3D tactical dice battler.

title: Train Set Code Demo
description: Build a train set layout where everything runs on its own. Automate points and signals to direct the trains and keep them moving. Get creative and design a huge network that carries a fleet of trains.

title: Hellbridge Demo
description: Defend the last bridge to the living world in a relentless siege from Hell. Survive escalating waves, draft powerful spells, grow stronger with every run, and enter cursed gates to stop the invasion at its source.

title: Cubic Spree Demo
description: Cubic Spree is a fast-paced 2D shooter - Play locally and online with your friends, choose your weapons, and blast your way to victory with colorful chaos!

title: Iris Grid Demo
description: Match by color or value. Chain combos. Craft builds. Outsmart 40+ levels that twist the rules. A roguelite tile-matching strategy game where every match feeds a scoring engine you design. 120+ cores, items, and patches. No two runs play the same.

title: SCP: Antimemetics Division Demo
description: No, it's not your first day. The Amnestics have kicked in, and Site-48 has locked down. Scavenge restricted gear, gain clearance to forgotten levels, and bend reality to escape lethal SCP anomalies. Tactile survival horror where remembering too much will get you annihilated.

title: BLORBIT Demo
description: Flip gravity to climb. BLORBIT is a cute-creature vertical platformer climbing 6 biomes from meadow to deep space. Flip platforms only hold when gravity matches. Go Endless, chase Dailies, relax in Zen, or race 10 players online. How high can you climb?

title: 4th & Goal Demo
description: 4th & Goal combines roguelite deckbuilding with American football. Make cuts, additions, and upgrades to your team through the Gauntlet Challenge!

title: Nytherra Demo
description: A cozy 2D adventure where you explore, gather resources, turn them into profit, craft, and battle enemies to save a fading world before time runs out.

title: Smokey Mike Demo
description: In stand-up, talent isn't always enough. In this point and click adventure you have to improvise, survive and fail with style until you craft the five minutes that could change everything.

title: WARD: Descent Demo
description: WARD: Descent is a 2D dungeon-crawler roguelike where you pilot an armored combat suit. Explore an overrun research laboratory, manage your suit's upgrades, and complete sequences to destroy anomalies. Descend to the bottom, pilot, and complete your mission! This demo features the first 2 floors!

title: KOTAMON: My Sis Found A Super-Rare Card In Her Cereal Box, So I Became A Garbage Man To Find The Entire Collection And Earn $1,000,000 Demo
Decline Demo
description: Welcome to your new night shift inside an abandoned underground drainage facility, you should handle the power problems nobody else wants to deal with. Your main task is simple: monitor the security cameras, manage your limited electricity, and survive until dawn. But don't HIDE, they see you.

title: Taddius and the Forbidden Bog Demo
description: In "Taddius and the Forbidden Bog", manage an inn for lost travellers, restore a ravaged bog, and find purpose in the most unexpected of places.

title: Big Golden Rock Demo
description: Big Golden Rock is a pixel incremental clicker about a huge golden rock. Gather resources, hire shooters and archers, build towers, launch rockets, summon UFOs, and unlock increasingly powerful upgrades.

title: Mass Edge - Gravity Ball Demo
description: Mass Edge Demo is a vibrant 3D puzzle-platformer inspired by the cult 90s classic Game, bringing back that unforgettable feeling of rolling, balancing, and thinking your way through impossible spaces.

title: Feed the Cat: Gravity Puzzle Demo
description: Move platforms, manipulate gravity, and solve relaxing physics puzzles to guide the food safely into the hungry cat's bowl. A cute, logic-based casual game where your main goal is simple: make sure the feline gets its treat!

title: Desktop Detective Demo
description: An idle detective game that sits in the corner of your screen while you do other things.

title: Altalis Demo
description: A puzzle Metroidvania game!

title: Draco Blade Demo
description: Draco Blade is a “Dragon-Action” game that combines exploration and combat within a land inhabited by dragons. Slash your way through the world, slice your foes, and discover where you came from in this blazing adventure!

title: Strange Finds Demo
description: Three thousand years ago, the legendary island of Mantas was lost to history. Today, you and your excavation team are digging on a tiny island where a shepherd has found some pottery... but you’re about to find something incredible.STRANGE FINDS is an adventure game inspired by the principles of real archaeology.

title: The Echo of MeMe-For You Adrift in the Sea of Reveries Demo
description: Welcome to the Meme Space—a dream of scattered fragments. Cross the plains, descend to the deep-sea city, link time, and ride to the Silver River. A denpa-style roaming text adventure, made for you.

title: Aleef: Desktop Pet Collector Demo
description: Work, browse, or play other games while hatching eggs in the background! Collect 300+ pets with various stats, unlock powerful upgrades, and build your battle team.

title: SANGUINE CYCLE; REDUX Demo
description: A narrative-driven thriller about missing people, stagnant towns, and the fact that even if you love someone, you can't always see the good sides of them when push comes to shove.

title: GRAIN ROT Demo
description: A horror co-op extraction builder set in a scorched wasteland where everything burns. Descend with your friends into shifting ruins, rip out furniture, and scavenge for loot before the Corrupted close in. Make it back alive, then rebuild the Outpost to better your chances for the next run.

title: Cat Mail Co. Demo
description: Run a cozy cat post office. Sort and deliver parcels from the daily boat, organizing everything your way. At night, the moon reveals hidden truths about packages. Clear a strange backlog, help locals, and unlock new abilities and destinations.

title: Life Sim : Shape your city (DEMO)
description: Build the city. Shape the society. Live the life. Wield absolute power over economy, trade, and demographics in this high-fidelity city builder sandbox demo. Prepare the ultimate living metropolis before stepping down to the pavement as a simulated citizen in Life Sim!

title: Pro Soccer Manager 27 Demo
description: Become the manager of a football team and take full control of your club. Manage scouting, training, facilities, and squad development. Choose your philosophy: focus on coaching and tactics, or invest in developing the next generation of stars. Success depends on your decisions.

title: Object Impermanence Demo
description: A first person puzzle game where your vision defines reality, and only the things you can see exist. Learn and master the strange behaviours of objects outside your vision. Traverse the ancient structures of a world forgotten by the universe.

title: Wreck Runners Demo
description: Try the demo of physics-based co-op extraction game for crews of 2-4 players. Venture into the twisted Bermuda Triangle aboard the ORCA, a hybrid utility craft that can fly, drive and dive. Gather loot, buy new equipment, and unlock cosmetics across chaotic runs.

title: After End Demo
description: This is the playable demo for After End, a First Person ARPG currently in development.

title: The Fish Corner Demo
description: In The Fish Corner, you run your own cozy pet fish shop and collect many unique breeds.Decorate your rooms and storefront, greet customers, and negotiate fair prices. Choose which fish you want to sell and which ones you want to keep for yourself.

title: Invaders Loop Demo
description: In Invaders Loop, which combines classic arcade spirit with roguelite mechanics, survive relentless waves of enemies raining down from the depths of space, dodge bullets, equip yourself with various items from the market, and defeat epic bosses.

title: Mythic Kart Maker Demo
description: Mythic Kart Maker is part level maker, part fantasy kart racer. Vehicular combat, whimsical characters, & a vibrant 64-bit pre-rendered art style come together to create a chaotic, creative playground where you build the race - and then survive it.

title: Trust Your Gut Demo
description: A rogue-lite roulette game. Born unlucky; your life is tied to this game. To survive, buy mementos you want, bend the odds, and return to each spin a little stronger.

title: The Walking Dead: Streets of Survival Demo
description: Fight walkers as Rick Grimes, Daryl Dixon and Michonne in a brutal arcade brawler set in the world of AMC’s The Walking Dead. Face ruthless enemies like the Saviors and overwhelming walker swarms as you unleash relentless combos, signature weapon attacks, and crushing finishers.

title: Touhou Sousenkyou ~ Land of Oracular Zeitgeist Demo
description: The Sousenkyou Battle Royale has hit the village's yellow brick roads! Strange things are happening behind the curtain. It's time for actors and stagehands to work hand-in-hand to find the real goals behind that popularity contest.

title: over the hill Demo
description: Journey through the first area of over the hill. Explore Emerald Lake solo or with friends, tackle technical off-road trails, discover wildlife, and uncover all hidden corners of the map.

title: Medieval Juice Crafter Demo
description: Craft your special recipe juices and sell them in medieval villages. Expand your business with new recipes, machines, properties, and workers. Play online with your friend or go solo, and enjoy the growth of your business. You can play the early game on the first map in this demo version.

title: 鸥鹭罔继 Demo
description: "Oulu Wangji" is a fantasy visual novel set in an alternate world. Players can choose different options to decide the story's direction, experiencing a tale intertwined with chuunibyou fantasy and melodramatic emotions.

title: Pepper the Giant Purple Dog Demo
description: In this twist on a harmless pet simulator, take care of Pepper, who happens to be a giant purple dog. But when things go awry, you will have to decide: how many lives is one good boy worth?

title: Euphorbia Milii Demo
description: A ruined research station reclaimed by nature. Days pass, resources disappear, and decisions leave lasting marks. Euphorbia Milii is a narrative, text-based roguelike RPG where existence costs more than survival. This is vegetation…

title: 五年B班事件簿 - The Grade 5B Case Files Demo
description: This demo includes the first nine scenes of Chapter 1 of The Grade 5B Case Files, offering a brief look at the game’s school-life mystery story through dialogue, observation, and deduction.

title: Going my way? Demo
description: In a world consumed by an insomnia pandemic, where there are no laws and people are going crazy, you're a train conductor racing through an endless night blizzard. Study the strange passengers, solve mysteries, and survive the time loop before the snowy abyss swallows you up.

title: Pixel Darts: From Pub to Glory Demo
Sky Yacht - Waves of Desire Demo
Planet Harvester: Incremental Odyssey Demo
description: Planet Harvester is a relaxing low-poly incremental game. Pilot your crawler across beautiful worlds, chew through resources, unlock new tools, hire drones, and customize your machine for ever bigger hauls. Turn small numbers into massive ones!

title: Lone Voyage Demo
description: You are the last living organism in the galaxy. Adrift and alone in a cold dark world you must scavenge for resources to keep your ship running, and arm your ship to prepare for the swarms arrival.

title: 李商隐：青袍玉珂传 Demo
description: “涧底群松难见日，衰世文章不值钱。”这款古风恋爱文字冒险游戏，在晚唐历史的基础上进行了戏剧化改编。你将扮演李商隐这位才华横溢却命运多舛的贫寒少年，在恶劣的世道挣扎求存，在寒门与豪门的斗争中进行艰难抉择，一路上也会有红颜知己相伴。本作对于角色的塑造复杂立体，而非分出绝对的正邪。

title: Gridlords Demo
description: Gridlords is a strategic async-PvP autobattler set in a fantasy pixel-art world. Build your ultimate castle, command legendary heroes, and outsmart rivals to prove your strategy reigns supreme.

title: Dog in the Machine Demo
description: Help an AutoDog escape a dystopian mecha-city in this turn-based tactical roguelite! Trigger devastating chain reactions on interactive combat grids, draft powerful synergies by crafting your own attacks, and plan your moves stress-free using a real-time preview timeline.

title: Elevator Wars Demo
description: Elevator Wars is a steampunk strategy roguelike that takes place from the comfort of your very own elevator. Fight, loot, and trade your way to the top - or die trying.

title: Lugal: Bronze Age Survival Game Demo
Vampire: The Masquerade - Oaths & Ashes: PROLOGUE
description: Paris. One night at the Opéra Garnier. Somewhere in the audience sits a man the Camarilla wants dead, and Alice Lytelton was sent to collect him. So was her rival. Only one walks out with the prize. Play the opening scenes of a Visual Novel set in the World of Darkness.

title: Grit Shot Demo
description: Miss the shot. You die. A cursed basketball roguelike where every throw is life or death.

title: Can I Take Your Order Demo
HarvestCo. Demo
description: Rebuild Grandpa’s neglected farm in this cozy farming incremental. Harvest crops, clear the field, process resources, unlock upgrades and automation, expand your land, and grow a tiny farm into a thriving business.

title: Magical Hellhound Lust Demo
description: Hack, slash and crush the succubi armies as the Magebane. Discover your true nature and reclaim your power in this vibrant, action-packed, rogue-lite ARPG. Enact vengeance with agile slashes, crushing hammer blows, chaotic magic, or combine all three styles to attain true godhood.

title: Miracle Mage: Awakened Elements Demo
description: "Awakened Elements" is a match-three strategy RPG where chaos spreads as the Demon King shatters elemental balance. As a young mage, awaken lost powers, rally elven allies, and battle through thorny paths to restore order before darkness consumes the world.

title: Hypatia Demo
description: Play the opening of Hypatia, a romance visual novel set in a café that is closing next week.

title: Sweet and Sour: Subway Romance Stories. Demo
Shadow Rush Demo
description: Slay hordes of Shadow Demons in this Action RPG with roguelike elements. Fast-paced combat, quick runs, build experimentation, and re-rolling characters. Spells are collectable, equip-able 'Shards' that trigger when you attack. CAN YOU BEAT THE SPEED OF DARKNESS?

title: MeloDancer Demo
description: A turn-based roguelike with rhythm-infused elements. The melody and pulse rising from the depths grant you strength, empower your choices. With every step, the darkness grows heavier and more enemies emerge from the shadows. Gather power, seek relics

title: Plumbo Demo
description: A playful desktop companion that reacts to everything you do to him. Pet, toss, or annoy Plumbo... just don't push your luck.

title: Bounty Trail Demo
description: A short Wild West bounty hunting RPG.

title: How Empires Work Demo
description: An incremental strategy game about history, expansion and development. Grow from humble beginnings to take your place on the world stage!

title: みちくさワンダラー Demo
description: The Demon Lord and the Hero are gone. With no mission to fulfill, no world to save, you hunt as you please, eat as you please, and travel as you please. It’s an RPG where you are free to do anything.

title: フリと忘れじの都 -FRI the Unforgettable City- Demo
description: 『フリと忘れじの都 -FRI the Unforgettable City- Demo』は、プレイヤーの選択で物語が変化するテキストアドベンチャーゲームの体験版です。コーヒー工房で働く記憶喪失の少女・フリを主人公に、少し不思議な世界の物語を描きます。体験版では本編のChapter1を遊ぶことができます。コーヒー豆を自分で選ぶか、店長に任せるか。遊びの誘いに乗るか、断ってしまうか……。あなたの選択によって、この世界はいろんな結末を迎えます。フリを巡る物語の終わりには何が待ち受けているのか？そして、この物語を〈選択〉するということは、どういうことなのか――。

title: Low Effort Romance Demo
description: Low Effort Romance is an otome visual novel about two tired adults who accidentally fall for each other between quarterly reports. Can you juggle deadlines, nosy coworkers, group projects, and a romance that keeps almost happening on company property?

title: DODGE-AND-RUN! Demo
description: You forgot to offer an offering to the God of Thunder!? Hurry and go apologize! Become a ninja and dash through a Japanese-style world! A high-speed Japanese-style action game!

title: Loot Gobblin' Together Demo
description: An online co-op game where you and your friends play greedy gobblins invading human houses to steal and gobble loot. Climb, stretch, and manage your stamina to survive chaotic heists and feed your Gobblin King.

title: Island Keeper (Demo)
description: Embark on a heartwarming eco-adventure as you breathe new life into polluted islands, gather trash, craft equipment, build your sanctuary, and witness nature flourish in a vibrant, ever-changing world. Welcome to Island Keeper DEMO.

title: Heave Ho 2 Demo
description: Get a grip, it’s Heave Ho 2! The insane 2-4 player party game sequel takes the couch co-op mayhem online for the first time. Grab what you can and swing to win!

title: Cannon Clicker Demo
description: Build your army from nothing to military supremacy! Cannon Clicker blends addictive idle clicker action with real strategy in a WWII setting. Expand your skill tree, juggle three currencies, and command infantry, tanks and aircraft. Crush the enemy base and dominate every battlefield!

title: Fission Mirror Grid Demo
description: Drag film cards on a 16×6 grid—facing and dyeing shape every hit. Face-up draws; chain Start, Instant, and End timings each turn. A 54-floor roguelike with four camera travelers, ~100 cards, and 30 relics.

title: Dreamer's Wake Demo
description: A stylized third person collectathon set in collapsing dreamscapes. Play as a Haniwa clay figure — conjure projectiles, rewind time, and explore surreal worlds to restore them from static.

title: Block Wars: Falling Duel Demo
description: Block Wars is a fast competitive puzzle battle inspired by 1990s arcade classics. Precision matters, reflexes win, and every move counts. Master unique block mechanics, unleash lightning-powered boosters, and defeat increasingly dangerous bots in the demo’s three combat stages.

title: Satan's Fall Demo
description: Satan has fallen. Now fight your way back up. A brutal top-down bullet hell roguelite where you play as the Devil himself. Upgrade your arsenal, unlock demonic powers, and face relentless hordes of Heaven's finest. Apparently, running Hell isn't as easy as it looks.

title: Creepy Shift: Deer Farm Demo
description: Run your farm, take care of your animals, and survive the storm. Try a demo that mixes farming sim with horror and throws you right into weird events from the very first minute.

title: am I STILL me：デッキ構築ローグライト Demo
description: This demo lets players experience the early portion of "am I STILL me", including turn-based deckbuilding battles, card rewards, Dark Powers, ally summoning, and the corruption system.The demo does not include all stages, cards, enemies, bosses, endings, or final game content.

title: 她于深渊 Demo
description: You accidentally intercept a distress signal from space—a girl codenamed C804 is venturing alone into a forbidden zone. Game time runs in perfect real-time sync with reality; every response, every silence, shapes her actions and decisions.

title: TankFall Arena Demo
description: TankFall Arena is a fast-paced top-down tank combat game where precision, ricochets, and weapon mastery decide every battle. Fight solo or with a friend, adapt to changing arenas, and outmaneuver opponents using unique weapons and environmental strategy.

title: 烘焙糕手 Demo
description: Welcome to Baking Master! This is a co-op roguelike management simulation game with a warm and comforting art style. Become an adorable animal chef and run a busy bakery with friends locally or online.

title: Omnidice Demo
description: An online 1-4 player co-op island game about collecting, rolling, and merging dice. Explore the island, trigger chain merges, and unlock new tools and mini-games to keep the collection growing.

title: 猫愿日记 Demo
description: 🐾 埋藏在幼猫心中的小小愿望，是否能传达到呢？这是仅有一室、一人、一猫娘的一场温馨且治愈的同居故事。让猫娘用恋慕之心温暖您的冬天！

title: Aenoic Abyss demo
description: Swap between two heroines (Paladin/Mage/Assassin/Centaur Archer) instantly in this 2D pixel-art roguelite platformer, forge permanent Diablo-inspired builds with 200+ affix combinations to conquer cycle-reborn abyssal labyrinths and rend the holy veil of the Purification Ritual.

title: Enginefall Demo
description: Enginefall is a player-driven crafting shooter set on colossal, post-apocalyptic megatrains. Start in the tail alone or with friends as you scavenge, craft, and build your way to First Class. Seize better gear car by car, and escape with high-value loot to upgrade your personal home on the rails.

title: Fowl Brawl: When Chickens Fly Demo
description: A physics-based catapult defense game with cute art and strategic depth. On a forgotten planet, magic-tech collision sparks a species war. Players control magical duck heroes, using ancient totems as boosters across six extreme terrains to battle mechanized chicken legions.
developer: 不犯二工作室, Liquid Meow

title: Children's Garden Demo
description: Welcome to the Reincarnation Ethics Program "Children's Garden." This is a puzzle game where you seek eternal rest.

title: Rhomfaya: The Rays of Liberty Demo
Eggscape Demo
description: A third person surviving action game. You’re a chicken escaping the slaughterhouse factory. Find your stolen chicks and free your fellow chickens as you fight through the factory, and survive the hunt from workers and failed lab creations.

title: 迷失小镇 Demo
description: Play as a maiden trapped in a foggy procedural town. Fight mutants with your starter weapon and collect glowing gems. Upgrade gear with gems to unlock new zones and random events: rewards, monster swarms, treasures, cursed trials. Level up for random magic cards;

title: Bunderkin: The Ocular Eclipse Demo
description: Trapped in a 3‑day time loop, you must master each moment and live the perfect day or watch the town that despises you fall into darkness.

title: PinballRobotDoctor Demo
description: This is a demo version of "Pinball Robot Doctor", Control the cybernetic pinball "mechanical repair" device, using your fingertips to precisely deflect the metal pinball onto the launcher. Overcome obstacles by colliding with mechanisms and ultimately repair the target to complete the level.

title: Forest Escape: Last Train Demo
description: Forest Escape: Last Train Demo is a co-op horror exploration game for 1-4 players in the mysterious forest. Repair your locomotive, solve the insane Warden’s eerie puzzles, and outrun the stuff of nightmares as you try to escape this twisted realm.

title: Crow's Foot Demo
description: A turn-based hex strategy you can finish over lunch. Outsmart AI rivals, each with their own grudges, ambitions, and breaking points. Conquer provinces, command knights, scouts, assassins, and more. Unlock rule-bending scrolls. Go bankrupt and your own army defects.

title: ONIGASHIMA: Awakening Demo
description: A predictive deck-building RPG! Build your strategy from over 300 cards! Form powerful formations with unique animal companions! Master countless combinations and claim overwhelming victories! Your adventure to defeat the ONI begins now!

title: Touhou Tenshiin  ~ Celestial Examination Hall
description: A fan-made 3D fighting game set in the Touhou Project universe! Unease once again shrouds Gensokyo, as terrifying rumors intertwine with the rising craze of 'Celestial Cultivation'!? End this chaos with dazzling combos and tactical mastery！

title: Heartfall Demo
description: A competitive online multiplayer Hearts card game where the rules shift every hand. Match against three opponents across five rotating game modes, each one adding a twist that changes how you play, pass, and score. Currently in playtest phase.

title: Abyss Forge Demo
description: Abyss forge is a sci-fi match-and-merge roguelike set in deep space. Move tiles, create matches, merge modules, gather fuel, efficiency, research, and other resources, then shape your build through random upgrades as you push your ship deeper into unknown sectors.

title: Dumb Dunks - Demo
description: Dumb Dunks! is a wildly creative, satirical twist on basketball where every level throws a ridiculous new object and target at you. Master tricky physics, perfect your timing, and embrace the chaos in this humorous physics-based dunking frenzy.

title: Virtual Karting Garage Demo
description: Get in the garage. Tune every mechanical and visual setting, then watch the chassis flex and tires deform in real time as you steer. Experience the physics now. Racing will come with Early Access soon.

title: ScapeTime Demo
description: ScapeTime is a challenging first-person parkour game where every second counts. Race through difficult levels, master precise movement, and reach the finish before time runs out.

title: My Coworkers Are Made Of Static Demo
description: A horror game, where you found yourself trapped at your job. Leave the office. And remember - The Spider is watching.

title: Supermarket Simulator: Idle Tycoon Clicker Demo
Goldfish Gunner Demo
description: Become the most wanted outlaw by taking on the role of Goldfish, a gunner robbing every bank in the Wild West. Escape across challenging, obstacle-filled landscapes where your only way to move is by firing your weapon and riding the recoil.

title: Skate Mates Demo
description: A chaotic multiplayer skating game where each player controls one skate! Only epic teamwork and swift communication will get you through the brutal obstacle course! Dodge the blades, jump the canyons, and avoid the lava, because one mistake sends you all the way back.

title: Twinkle Seek Demo
description: Go search for sparkles to the ends of the world!

title: Janet DeMornay Is A Slumlord (and a witch) Demo
description: FILTHY RENTER! Here is one of the full puzzle rooms from JANET DEMORNAY IS A SLUMLORD (AND A WITCH) is you simply MUST try it.

title: Waning Light Demo
description: Waning Light is a story-rich card battler with life-sim elements, where players navigate five days of balancing real-world responsibilities and a shifting dream world shaped by their choices. What you focus on, and what you neglect, changes how both worlds unfold.

title: Elven Huntress: Sunveil Demo
description: Atmospheric 3D Action RPG about an elven huntress exploring a fantasy world through magical portals. Explore the first location, collect rare equipment, and discover the world of Sunveil.

title: Loaded Dice - A Yahtzee Roguelike Demo
Powder Runners: Maze Quest Demo
description: Run, fight, and survive in deadly labyrinths filled with traps, monsters, and rivals. Play alone or with friends and be the first to find the Magic Portal before it's too late.

title: CyberZ: Energy Wars Demo
description: CyberZ: Energy Wars Demo is a fast-paced third-person shooter PvP. Every match drops you into a war zone where two things matter: your aim and your economy. At the start of each round, spend your earned credits on weapons and gear or save up for something devastating next round.

title: Deepcore Mining Demo
description: Mine rare ores on a distant planet and sell them to fill your corporate quota. Use your profits to buy upgrades. But beware: the deeper you dig, the greater the dangers waiting in the dark.

title: Dead Rose Demo
description: Hand-crafted 2D pixel art action-adventure. Play as Lucky, a skeleton lost in the world of spirits, and set out in search of Rose through a dark and magical world that blends Metroidvania exploration with Zelda-like adventure.

title: How to Fly a Cannon Demo
description: Your cannon isn't just a weapon - it's also how you launch into the air! Shoot towards the ground and fly skyward in this physics-based destruction game.

title: Pubes Demo
description: A 3D action game where you control a strand of body hair and move around a 3D room! Use the unique fluffy floating and sticking abilities of body hair to safely reach your destination!

title: Perfect Cut Demo
description: In Perfect Cut, your goal is to slice various aliments such as bananas, carrots, toast, and apples. The challenge? Cut each item to match the exact target and make Perfect Cut. Precision is key!

title: RetroSpace Demo
description: Disco-punk space horror where you can be a sneaky chap or a mutant action hero as you try to survive on a space station swallowed by a black hole. A mind-bending ride with weird creatures, immersive features, time jumps, and '70s mustaches!

title: Kev-Inn's Packaging Facility Demo
description: Kev-Inn's Packaging Facility is a strategy roguelike inspired by your favorite block-dropping games!Build a deck of multiple types of boxes, place them on a grid, and watch them cause a chain reaction of different effects!

title: Play Faster Demo
description: Play Faster is a speedrunning-first precision platformer: short, intense runs, instant retries, pixel-perfect movement, built-in speedrunning tools and deterministic runs.

title: Just Grow Demo
description: Jump into this fast-paced action-roguelite and purge a cursed orphanage! Crush murderous toys with your bare hands, spend looted souls on arcade machines, and chain your abilities into devastating combos to end the nightmare once and for all.

title: D-Extinction Demo
description: D-Extinction is a first-person investigative horror game. A secret experiment went too far. Now the pre-historic predators are loose. Explore, investigate, and survive in a immersive horror experience where one mistake can kill.

title: Samsara: Retro Man Universe Demo
description: Control the battlefield in a tactical arcade shooter. Sacrifice safety, earn invincibility, slow time, and unleash a devastating beam to obliterate entire waves of enemies.

title: Vape Store Miami Demo
description: Run your own retro Miami vape shop in this 1–4 player co-op simulator. Stock shelves, serve customers, craft custom e-liquids, handle phone and online orders, grow your reputation, and expand the business.

title: Horrorvania Demo
description: The protagonist's wife disappears under mysterious circumstances in an enigmatic place shrouded in terrifying rumors. As the protagonist, embark on a search for her. The demo version features three locations and one boss.

title: Strikers Club Demo
description: Strikers Club is a multiplayer football game where you play as one player and compete in action-packed matches against others. Every move counts. Master dribbling, passing, and shooting while working with your team to outplay opponents.

title: Gnome Glade Demo
description: Gnome Glade - a cozy city builder puzzle with deckbuilding. Help gnomes build a village in a magic forest! Grow and merge mushrooms, build your deck of cards, and raise a golden statue. Create a gnome paradise!

title: ORBTRUDER Demo
description: ORBTRUDER is a tactical roguelite action platformer about a ricocheting killer robot ball. Climb ever higher up a mysterious skyscraper. Ricochet, attack, slow down time, respawn, and try again.

title: Viking Vending Demo
description: Start with a Viking harbor at your command—buy low, sell high, and turn a tidy profit! Identify unknown treasures and strike it rich overnight! Rebuild the blacksmith's forge, enchant mighty artifacts, hire fierce raiders, and make every Viking your loyal customer!

title: 命运挽歌：词汇英灵录 序章
description: You are a new student at Lunrant Magic Academy, the top magic school on the continent of Yusiaid. Here, you’ll learn to control Spirit Cards and summon mighty Spirits. By mastering magic spells (English words), you’ll guide your Spirits in battle and grow into a powerful Spirit Summoner.

title: Late Order Demo
description: Night shifts at a cursed 24/7 diner. Every night — new rules and unsettling events. Fulfill orders, don't annoy the bizarre monster in the mascot's body, and maybe you'll have a chance to survive until dawn.

title: SPACERO: ORIGINS Demo
description: Pilot a customizable ship through a hostile open galaxy in this top-down space action RPG demo. Mine resources, trade at stations, upgrade your weapons, survive faction attacks, and face a massive boss encounter.

title: Trash Day Demo
description: Team up with your raccoon squad in this physics-based co-op adventure. Scavenge trash, fill your stolen shopping cart, and work together to get back home. Live your best raccoon life.

title: The Few Demo
description: Fly the Spitfire and dogfight the Luftwaffe over the Channel in this free demo of The Few — a WW2 combined-arms combat game built for players, not whales. No grind, no premium currency, no paywalled planes. One fair price for the whole war.

title: A Little Space Demo
description: A top-down 2D space game about going fast through platformer-style levels. Master your ship's momentum-based movement, unlock abilities, race the clock and hunt for secrets as you guide lost astronaut Riley on her journey home from deep space.

title: Retro Arcade Shop Simulator (Demo)
description: Try the Demo and transform a dusty room into a profitable Retro Arcade Shop! Place Car Simulators, Basketball hoops, and Arcade Machines. Set up a Bowling Area to increase your hourly income. Customize your walls, manage the cafeteria, and build your 80s venue!

title: Gold Mining Simulator 2 Singleplayer Demo
description: Take control of powerful heavy machinery in this realistic gold mining simulator. Excavate the Alaskan soil, build and maintain washplants, and pan for riches. Balance your resources, manage tailings, sell your extracted gold, and upgrade your gear to join the gold rush!

title: Astro Industry Wars Demo
description: Astro Industry Wars is a lighthearted take on the RTS genre featuring distinct unit types, base building, economic production chains, and customizable unit rosters.

title: Monkey Bizniz Demo
description: An online co-op physics game about collecting bananas for the Monkey King's feast — fill your cart, find the summit, and try not to blame your friends when it all goes wrong.

title: Bitloop Demo
description: You steer a drone's orbit while it fires for you. Ride close to break the vault faster, ride wide to live longer. Strip the ring, crack the core, fall to the next vault. A one-stick roguelite about orbital mining.

title: Security 51 Demo
description: You're a security officer deep within Area 51. Scan the staff, verify clearances, and decide who can enter the elevator and who absolutely mustn't leave. The deeper you go, the less certain you are that anyone standing before you is still human.

title: Ask Mom: Находи предметы, учи слова Demo
Arcane Towerline Demo
description: Arcane Towerline is a roguelite tower defense blending auto-battler synergies. On a dynamic battlefield, draft powerful 1-to-5 cost units to build a formidable lineup. Defend your crystal from swarms of enemies using tactical positioning and random game-changing magic!

title: Sweep Happens Demo
description: Minesweeper meets dungeon crawler! Use classic number logic to dodge monsters, loot treasure, and explore procedurally generated dungeons in this lighthearted roguelite RPG. Quick 15-minute runs, absurd humor, and a lot to explore.

title: Warding Witches Demo
description: The Warding Witches Demo offers a classic, unapologetic bullet hell shoot ‘em up challenge while also putting defense into players’ hands. Experience an adrenaline-filled flow alternating between attacking, defending and dodging.

title: Gargoyle Garden Demo
description: Sit back, relax, and grow many magical and mystical plants in your very own greenhouse! Collect rare plants, upgrade your tools, and earn enough money to unlock new greenhouses.

title: Cheat Death Demo
description: Demo version of a dark strategic roguelite where you play dice poker with the Grim Reaper. Build powerful poker hands from cursed dice, stack upgrades, rig the odds, sabotage Death, and survive deadly mini-games with your life on the line.

title: Major Hoof Demo
description: Major Hoof is going to safe the world.A crazy, fast‑paced 2D shooter with bullet‑hell and beat ’em up elements, intense combat tempo, and environmental destruction.At the narrative level, the game follows a cynical commando dedicated to freeing victims of human trafficking. Despite its pixel art style, it tackles serious and heavy themes.

title: Hatarake! - Working Hard! Even though I getting isekai'd! Demo
description: Working Hard! Even though I getting isekai'd! is a simulation game similar to the old Harvest Moon/Rune Factory series. Set in Grion, a small village somewhere in Xelia. A fantasy world where magic and monsters are exist.

title: BallShot Arena Demo
description: BallShot Arena reimagines competitive multiplayer by blending the strategy of sports games with the precision of shooters, without player damage.Precision Physics-Driven GameplayTactical Loadouts and Creative PlaystylesCompetitive Multiplayer MatchesVictory Road ProgressionBuilt for SpectatorshipEasy to Learn, Hard to MasterPRECISION...

title: Stratego® Online Demo
description: Stratego Online brings the timeless strategy and excitement of the original board game into the 21st century, providing players with an immersive online experience that blends classic gameplay with innovative features.

title: Suicide Mr. Fury Demo
description: Suicide Mr. Fury is a Meta-Otome adventure that deconstructs the absurdity of falling for someone who doesn’t exist. Navigate branching paths, meta-narratives, and a multiverse of madness with the overbearing CEO, Mr. Fury, between digital delusion and harsh reality.

title: FERALPALS Demo: Chapter 1
description: Feralpals is a chapter-based mascot horror game. Humanity was wiped out by a pathogen linked to Friendly Pals, genetically engineered creatures, granted human-like intelligence to serve mankind’s ambitions. The Pals are now left behind, imitating their creators' society long after humanity vanished.

title: Dream Corp Demo
description: This is an integrated company simulation game combining construction, management, and life elements. As the boss, precisely control each character without cumbersome page operations. Encounter random events, explore employees' hobbies, quirks, and build a dream company together.

title: Lazy Witch's Factory Demo
description: A run-based rogue-lite factory builder where middle management meets lawless Hell. Optimize production, make questionable deals, and race against the debt deadline.

title: Wonderland Demo
description: On the fantastical continent of Elfar, where swords and magic reign, you will establish and grow your own guild, leading members to accept quests, challenge dungeons, forge equipment, participate in competitions, and gradually uncover the secrets of the nine sacred sites

title: Chiggas - Survival of the Mitiest Demo
description: Survive the swarm, recruit Chigga Soldiers, unlock wild powerups, and fight through chaotic stages in Chiggas: Survival of the Mitiest, a fast arcade survival game packed with weapons, boosts, bosses, and Legendary Chigga Wear.

title: Break, Then Upgrade Demo
description: A simple incremental game. Fire barrages at floating debris on the ocean floor, grab the loot, and upgrade!!!

title: 暗层 Demo
description: Investigate supernatural cases through an archive management system. Read files, find clues, compare contradictions, and decide the truth. This demo includes the first three cases and shows the core archive investigation gameplay.

title: BrainMess Demo
description: You've been locked in a room with pen, paper, pins, and strings, and you're not leaving until it makes sense.

title: Star Wrath Demo
description: Star Wrath is a multiplayer space extraction-action where you design your own ship and fight other players for resources in intense PvP and PvE battles.

title: Cat Hits the Deck Demo
description: Deckbuilder roguelike about a cat that fears being hurt but has only cards that hurt her before enemies! Min-max your resources, get OverPowered cards in your paw, and build an unlosable Deck that prolly gonna kill you 9 times^^

title: Harmonic Drive Demo
description: An arcade-style rhythm game featuring full AI generated EDM. Build combos, chase perfect runs, climb the leaderboards, and experience a soundtrack built for late-night sessions and score chasing.

title: Overball Demo
description: Inspired by Pong, Overball reinvents the classic formula with explosive power-ups, destructible defenses, and a ball that grows more dangerous with every hit. Battle with up to 6 local players in fast-paced, frantic, and utterly chaotic matches.

title: Goblin Attack Demo
description: Shoot goblins, grow your army, and maintain your speed with every tap. Play in full screen or let the game run silently at the bottom of the screen while you do other things.

title: Star-Coat Demo
description: Embark on a quest to collect remnants of dead gods and save the universe from freezing over. Master nimble combat as a pilot and when things get dire, call on your COAT for help. Fight, explore, and loot to create the ultimate hero of the Stars.

title: Team Disorder Demo
description: Team Disorder Demo is an intro into the full game. This adventure includes one large map with many exciting missions and things to find!

title: Standard Human Pizza Demo
description: Make deadly pizzas to kill monsters. Standard Human Pizza is a horror-cooking sim where you serve monsters, survive anomalies, and use lethal ingredients to exterminate your clientele.

title: Averi the Accursed Demo
description: Shunned outsider Averi becomes her small planet's last hope against the tyrannical Lord Kroff and Lady Psonos in this action-packed 2D pixel art platformer.

title: Invisible Ascent Demo
description: A rage-inducing memory platformer where the path disappears before you jump. Study the platforms, trust your memory, and climb upward one painful mistake at a time.

title: Human Resources Demo
description: You work in Human Resources. In the demo of this dystopian document thriller, use your terminal to scrutinize records and expose human-like AI. Spot contradictions to detect the impostors. Efficiency is mandatory. Failure is unforgivable.

title: Mouseman: Point and Click RPG Adventure Chapter 1 Demo
description: Noir-themed Point and Click RPG Adventure with Turn-based battles! Pickpocket innocent people, eat cheese, rumble with the C.A.T.S., uncover secrets and rise to the top of the criminal underworld to become Top G!

title: Mushrooms vs Engineers Demo
description: Mushrooms vs Engineers is a top-down arena shooter where you "The Engineer" battle the endless hordes of Mushrooms over 20 waves until you defeat the final boss of each area. Choose your own battles by upgrading the spawn rates of Mushrooms and using their spores to increase your own power.

title: 十个好人Ten Innocent People Demo
description: The Righteous Army has nevertheless issued the "Order of Ten," granting this fallen nation one final chance. In this portion, the Emissary will establish his base and intelligence network.The demo includes one important hidden side quest,Can you find that young man with the blue eyes?

title: Bubble Balance Bonanza Demo
description: Roll, bump, jump, and crash your way through this fast-paced, marble style, physics-driven platformer. With fun environments, cute characters and crazy obstacles to overcome, you'll need to keep your balance to complete the journey! Are YOU ready for the bonanza?

title: Mining and Dwarves Demo
description: Mining and Dwarves is an incremental game where you mine rocks, gather ore, and recruit dwarves. Use powerful abilities for maximum gains, or relax and let your dwarves do the work.

title: Nia and The Abyss Demo
description: Nia and The Abyss is an Underwater Creature Collector, Cleanup, Farming, and Ecosystem Sim. Clean pollution, cultivate plants, attract and evolve marine life. Restoring balance to a responsive ocean.

title: The Last Roll Demo
description: An extraction-style board game that demands constant thinking, dice rolling, and decision-making. The true challenge lies not in combat skills, but in tactical choices, resource management, and strategy.

title: Eldread: Horrors of a Dark Moon Demo
description: Manage your dwindling oxygen levels and navigate a cosmic horror roguelite in a lunar colony. Confront nightmarish body-horror anomalies, survive unpredictable text-driven events, and endure the madness waiting beneath the dark moon.

title: School Owner Simulator Demo
description: In this demo version, the playable area is limited to a small section of the school. Players will only be able to access the classroom facility, while other facilities such as bathrooms, the cafeteria, the teacher room, the garden, and other school areas are not yet available.Accessible in the current demo:1.

title: [Bober Bros] Last Pill Bar LEAKED Demo
description: A choice-driven bartender sim. Serve drinks. Get to know troubled guests. Shape their stories through branching dialogue and pub games. Not for children or the easily disturbed.

title: TOOSIN : 투신 Demo
description: Face an AI that evolves by learning your combat patterns in real time. TOOSIN is a roguelike game where you fight against enemies that analyze and counter your habits. Become the TOOSIN by creating your own build with a variety of perks, traits, weapons, and combos.

title: Splash monsters 1+2 Demo
description: This demo features some of the groovy levels included in the full game. Splash the monsters back to their own reality in style. Explore the elements of both games with monsters made of water and sand.

title: D.E.C.A.Y. Demo
description: After a nuclear war, the United States became a network of dangerous sectors. You are a lone operative of D.E.C.A.Y., responsible for controlling a remote bunker. Explore ruins, gather resources, carry out orders, and interact with factions in a dying world where order is a matter of choice.

title: Kotoha’s Sealed Sword: Hiragana Deckbuilding Demo
description: Learn and master Japanese with Kotoha! Join her as she goes on a mission to find her grandfather's sealed sword. Discover new creatures. Unlock and craft new words, add them to your hand to aid you in battle.

title: Battlements Demo
description: Pirate ships, fortresses, and cannons! Battlements is an arcade reimagining of the "Rampart" classic. Defend the peaceful nation of Marinia from the dreaded Crimson Waves Empire - build walls, set up cannons, bombard the enemy! Control the fight with upgrades and special cards!

title: The Dark West Demo
description: The Dark West is a western occult ARPG set across a dying frontier that is consumed by corruption. Fight to survive with era-specific weapons and dark magic as you face deadly encounters and uncover distinctive items.

title: Slay The Saxons Demo
description: Slay The Saxons is a fast-paced, tactical rogue-lite game played on an isometric grid. Command a warband of Viking heroes, each with unique abilities, against endless waves of Saxons. Position your shield wall, shove enemies into hazards, and master the grid to survive against overwhelming odds.

title: Cosmic Carl Demo
description: The only things between Carl the Alien and the cold, uncaring vacuum of space are his rubbery forcefield, and a powerful rocket placed precariously on his back. Try not to kill Carl as you rocket, bounce, and orbit your way through fast paced, short levels with wacky physics.

title: Silky Road Demo
description: Build your train from unique carts, fight waves of enemies, collect loot, and upgrade your setup to get stronger in this casual mix of auto-battler, train defense, strategy, and idler mechanics.

title: Frustration Demo
description: FIND A SERIAL KILLER BEFORE YOUR MIND COLLAPSESYou are Jeff Dowliff — a detective whose memory is slowly deteriorating.Investigate murders using:- newspapers- polaroids- evidence boards- handwritten notesBut reality itself becomes unreliable.Doors lead back to your apartment.Televisions speak directly to you.

title: EVIDENCE Demo
description: EVIDENCE is an atmospheric neo-noir detective thriller. Investigate murders, narcotics trafficking, underground casinos, disappearances, arson cases, robberies, and strange incidents that slowly begin connecting into something far bigger.

title: Just Keep Fishing Demo
description: A short incremental game about catching a lot fish.

title: Bus Terminal Simulator Demo
description: Experience an immersive terminal management simulator. Manage passengers, organize schedules, inspect luggage, catch smugglers, and prevent illegal activities. Not every passenger is innocent some will try to trick you or smuggle illegal items. Stay alert and run your terminal efficiently.

title: 流転のジェミニ Demo
description: A short demo of the RPG Gemini in Flux, a small interlude within the main story. The protagonist roams the land of the dead with their partner — an apothecary — seeking clues to their lost memories and a gift to thank the one they love. Chat with townsfolk to find "Mitama Stones."

title: Chreynard Demo
description: Rewind time and control clones to solve intricate puzzles in this innovative 2D action-puzzler. Use your wits and skills to conquer all 30 stages of charming, nostalgic pixel art.

title: Idle Hacker Demo
description: IdleHacker is an idler/incremental game where you hack the world.

title: Hexborn Demo
description: Hexborn is a dark fantasy action RPG where you rise from an unknown mage into the leader of a legendary guild. Master arcane combat, recruit powerful allies, forge relics, and descend into dangerous dungeons and large-scale raids to uncover the secrets behind your rare ability to fly.

title: Anomaly Road [DEMO]
description: "Anomaly Road" is an escape game set on a mountain road in Japan, combining horror, driving, and strange occurrences. While driving, you suddenly realize you've gotten lost on a road deep in the mountains. As you turn a corner with a bad feeling, what awaits you...?

title: A Puzzle game where you fold Dice Demo
description: Fold a net of a dice into a cube. This is the only video game in existence that relies on your 3D Spatial Reasoning skill.

title: Project P.I.T.T. Demo
description: Feed rubber ducks to a corporate void. Build physics contraptions. Chain combos for profit as the Maw grows hungrier... and larger. Brutalist PSX satire meets first-person sandbox chaos.

title: Flesh Blossom Demo
description: Experience the horror of this Victorian-inspired medical RPG. As Doctor Parsnip Green, you’ll point-and-click your way through difficult choices as you investigate the disease’s origin, operate on patients, and fight to save those you love - all while managing your own dwindling sanity.

title: GemCraft - Legacy Collection Demo
description: Try out the first few levels of the first three games of the best tower defense franchise of all time!

title: Slay the GoblinZ Demo
description: It is a demo version of Slay the GoblinZ Slay the GoblinZ - is a dark fantasy incremental RPG where you take on a job to exterminate goblins. Craft unique weapons, master deadly skills, and put an end to the Goblin Forefather.

title: County of Fortune Demo
description: Build an entire medieval county, not just a city. Found villages across a wide, varied landscape, weave trade along rivers and roads, and guide mayors, noble houses, and cultures as your region comes to life. A city-builder on a much bigger scale, no two counties are alike.

title: Zombie Hamsters Demo
description: A 4-player cooperative online game. Escape from a scientific laboratory while playing as zombie hamsters and infect everyone around you.

title: 孟婆靓汤 Demo
description: 一款带有模拟经营元素的纯狱系调饮类视觉小说。玩家扮演新孟婆“小孟娘”，在熟悉又陌生的现代地府中经营汤屋，招待来自三界形形色色的客户。通过熬制各种特调汤品，解决各式千奇八怪脑洞大开的遗忘需求，并逐渐了解到自己失忆和老孟婆失踪的真相……欢迎来到孟婆靓汤！这里的宗旨是——“忘陈莫急”！

title: Dig Raiders: Anomaly Extraction Demo
description: DIG Raiders: Anomaly Extraction is a co-op digging sim where you and your crew burrow through 10+ layers of the unknown—team up to uncover the truth, battle rivals, and race to secure alien gems. Dig deep. Extract the anomaly. Get out alive!

title: Bean Wizard Eviscerates the Gonklins Demo
description: 🫘 The world's first twin-stick anthill shooter! 🫘 Reign terror down on the Gonklins using every bean in your arsenal. Be careful, warrior Gonklins will strike back with their blasters! Upgrade your legume weaponry and defeat King Donklin the Gonklin!

title: Press a Button Simulator Demo
description: Welcome to Press a Button Simulator: a new and exciting twist on modern video games. Gone is the time of tryhards and sweats, and in is the new age of only pressing a button! Will you find all the secrets? Of course not! There is only one: You get to press a button!

title: Bees Harvest Demo
description: An incremental roguelite collection game where you use gathered nectar and pollen to level up your bees. Start by collecting resources by hand, then automate your swarm. Gather as much nectar and pollen as you can within the limited time.

title: Farm Factory Simulator Demo
description: Grow crops, automate production, and manage your own store. Turn fresh harvests into valuable products, optimize your workflow, and build the ultimate farm-to-market business.

title: BirdPakour Demo
description: Be free as a bird and dodge the obstacles that come your way.

title: The Big Owl Night Demo
description: Survive a chaotic night in São Paulo of zombies, bosses and cursed upgrades in a fast-paced top-down roguelite. Collect weapons, trigger strange synergies, visit odd merchants and fight until the Big Owl lets you see another sunrise.

title: Elecade Demo
description: Strike down rampaging machines with chain lightning. Elecade is a 1-bit action game with incremental upgrades, where you power up and climb to the top of a space facility.

title: 难道你是GAL高手 Demo
description: An introverted girl who is bad at games, an artist who struggles with drawing human anatomy, a wealthy young lady who wants to play visual novels for the rest of her life, and a younger sister trying her best to understand what anime is—you will play their protagonist and start a romantic comedy!

title: Meow Time: cozy cat room Demo
description: MeowTime

title: Hack 42: Typing Incremental Demo
description: Hack 42 is a short typing incremental game about crafting powerful hacks and smashing computers for fun and profit.

title: SWAT God Demo
description: SWAT God can do things that most do not understand and many refuse to believe. Move like lightning. Dispatch whole squads with one burst and vanish before the sound hits their friends. Bolt to the hostage and rush them to safety in a blur.

title: FreeStyle Football 2 Demo
description: Freestyle Football 2 is a fast-paced, 5v5 match-based online multiplayer soccer game. Each position has a unique role, and you'll utilize a variety of strategies and skills to achieve victory with your team. Stylish play and unique characters transform the pitch into a stage.

title: Increbouncer Demo
description: Increbouncer is a short incremental ball game where you launch balls, earn two different currencies from wall bounces and ball collisions, unlock new balls, and level up a skill tree to maximize your income.

title: Fruit Fetish Demo
description: Fruit Fetish is an active incremental game where you must strive to make as much money as fast as possible by harvesting and selling a range of juicy fruits. Upgrade your skills and shop to become a master at your craft. Maybe if you work hard enough, you can finally please your corporate overlords.

title: Lofi Cozy Room Demo
description: A transparent mini-room in a corner of your desktop and gentle Lo-Fi music to make your work time cozier. Try every feature of Lofi Cozy Room ahead of launch with the demo.

title: Wall World Strategy Demo
description: Build and lead a colony on the surface of an endless Wall. Manage resources and your people, develop new technologies, defend against relentless zyrex attacks, and send robo-spiders on risky expeditions. Keep the colony from collapsing – in Wall World, it's easy to fall.

title: Between Adventures IDLE Demo
description: Idle RPG Strategy game where you gather resources, battle creatures, and upgrade your gear. Master 10+ skills to create items you can equip or sell. Your journey never stops, even offline. No Microtransactions, No P2W, just pure idle fun.

title: War Alert Demo
description: As the frontline crawls through ruins and smoke, you command infantry, armor, and air support to shape the chaos. Capture points, break lines, encircle and counter-encircle. With no pay-to-win, only clear strategy and teamwork earns victory.

title: Car Wash Simulator (Demo)
description: FOAM! RINSE! SHINE! Jump into the car washing business and take a high-pressure look at this official demo! Blast road grime with rich active foam, master core cleaning mechanics from windows to tires on 3 unique cars, and test-drive vehicles in the parking lot!

title: 2 Players 1 Character Demo
description: A co-op game about two souls trying to escape underworld and reach heaven while controlling one adorable character.

title: Void Ignition Demo
description: Void Ignition Demo is an atmospheric sci-fi incremental game.

title: Idle Bookstore Demo
description: A cozy idle bookstore you grow from a tiny shop into a thriving business — solo or with friends. Co-work together, write books as a group, and sell each other’s books for profit.

title: Labytrip Spirit Demo
description: LabyTrip Spirit is an adventure puzzle-action game about a soul lost in the labyrinths of the afterlife. Work with friends to guide the spirit to ascension, or vie with other players toward the abyss. Be watchful, shrewd, and swift as you make your way through the changing labyrinths of limbo.

title: Bag and Tag (Demo)
description: Bag and Tag (Demo) is a turn‑based, light‑roguelike deck‑builder about digging for items. With a magical backpack that pulls everything back inside, you upgrade your tools, discover fun synergies, and fight to protect the kingdom.

title: 가리사니 흥신소 Demo
description: Garisani Detective Agency is a story-driven real-time co-op deduction game for two.In 1990s Korea, play as a brother and his ghost sister, taking cases from the living and the dead. Gather clues from two angles and solve puzzles together.An analog era of pagers and payphones.

title: Into the Cannon, Soldier! Demo
description: You are the commander on the last line of defense. Hold your base, recruit soldiers, and launch them via cannon to another collapsing front. A cooperative (1-2 players) tactical defense game where your decisions decide the fate of two battles.

title: Immortal Sect Defend Demo
description: Guard the Sect Eye or lose everything. Build immortal towers to defend against demon hordes. Explore dangerous realms, slay beasts, and upgrade your defenses in this unique cultivation tower defense game.

title: STILL WATCHING: The Night Caregiver Demo
description: An exclusive prologue to the interactive horror game. Connect your real smartphone and Twitch chat to the game. Hide, stay quiet on your mic, and survive. Your chat controls your fear in real time, while a call to your real phone will give you away to the monster in the dark.

title: VOID ARMOR: FORM DRIVE Demo
description: A top-down mecha action shooter where you instantly switch between an Energy Blade, rifle, launcher, and defense system to destroy enemy machines. Close the distance to slash, attack from range, or defend against incoming fire. Clear missions, improve your performance, and aim for higher ranks.

title: Blosharper: Battle of Blossoms Demo
description: Blosharper is a roguelike deckbuilder that twists the rules of traditional Korean Hwatu. Don't rely on luck—use illicit "cheat" skills to manipulate the deck and survive a deadly underground gambling den. Pay off your crushing debt, defeat ruthless bosses, and become the ultimate sharp!

title: 伏煞3 夜诊 Demo
description: Spend a terrifying night of uncertain life and death in a late-night hospital via text adventure. *Fu Sha 3: Night Clinic * has numerous side choices and over twenty endings. Every choice may trigger unbearable horror—can you make the right ones, avoid fatal dangers, and escape this death curse?

title: 时光枝的秋叶 Demo
description: 如果你所爱的一切，注定会被时代的洪流吞没，你是否愿意为之而战？ 国产独立ADV游戏《时光枝的秋叶》试玩版，包含故事序章，展现世界观、角色关系和第一重核心悬念。以视觉小说的方式展现人与人工智能，渺小的个体与社会的浪潮之间最真实的碰撞。

title: Tap Dungeon Demo
description: Pixel-art isekai roguelike dungeon crawler! 5 classes, mix skills & items freely in turn-based combat across deadly random dungeons. Fight goblins, orcs, undead; collect artifacts, beat hidden bosses. Death = rebirth, endless builds await. Become the hero saving the kingdom!

title: Personality Imprint Demo
description: Welcome to the Next Fest demo of Personality Imprint, a tactical RPG where your strategic choices and character traits shape the battlefield.What's included in this demo:Tactical Combat: Experience the core grid-based strategy and test your tactical prowess.

title: Knock From Inside Demo
description: On Halloween night, something begins knocking from inside your apartment, turning an ordinary night into a terrifying encounter with something that should not be there.

title: Pun Chan Pop Demo
description: Think fast, match faster! Chain 5 pieces in any direction to win, or use the Square-Merge to turn 2x2 clusters into massive, high-scoring blocks before clearing them. Battle cute animals to a pulsing Bitpop soundtrack in this frantic puzzle showdown!

title: SHROT Demo
description: Make your way through destroyed Las Vegas and fight aliens, robots, and degenerates (zombies) in this goofy, funny, male-oriented humoristic FPS inspired by boomer shooters!

title: Lamp Clicker Demo
description: A small preview of Lamp Clicker — a simple idle/clicker game about… well, clicking a lamp.

title: Fever Trip Demo
description: Fever Trip is a surreal roguelike FPS where the arena reacts to your system audio. Wield living weapons, fight grotesque creatures, collect upgrades, and survive a chaotic fever dream powered by your own music.

title: Brassfang Demo
description: Explore a castle filled with monsters and sinister experiments in this steampunk action RPG metroidvania. Combine vampiric and mechanical powers, face challenging bosses, and create unique builds through randomized upgrade choices.

title: Hannibal Demo
description: Hannibal is a grand strategy game with real-time tactical battles. Choose regions on the campaign map, command your army, and take direct control when war begins. Build formations, break enemy lines, and lead your empire to victory through smart strategy and battlefield decisions.

title: Graveyard Cabin Demo
description: An FMV anomaly horror game. You are a night guard at a desolate graveyard. Monitor the cameras, spot the unnatural, and survive.

title: The three little pigs at the slaughterhouse Demo
description: Deep inside a slaughterhouse, play as three little pigs trying to escape in this first‑person horror adventure. Between twisted experiments and industrial death, will you survive this hell where madness and hatred reshape flesh

title: Bust a Nut! A Game About Raising Cocks Demo
developer: Society for the Advancement of Agriculture

title: Character Limit Demo
description: 12 Letters, No Mercy. The demo of the fast-paced typing word game. How long can you last before you hit your Character Limit?

title: Paranormal Footages : Supervisor Demo
description: Paranormal Footages: Supervisor Demo — a prequel to the events of the main game. Archie is supposed to finish his last shift at the warehouse before his transfer, but inexplicable events begin to unfold.

title: From Ashes To Glory Demo
description: A turn-based medieval arena RPG where every dodge matters. Forge your legend as Korkut, a young gladiator searching for the truth behind his father's disappearance. Master the blade, time your strikes, and rise through the tournaments — or fall in the sand.

title: The Birds of Egg Isle Demo
description: Run a small sanctuary on Egg Island: grow birdseed, care for birds, hatch eggs, and collect different species of birds through breeding and genetic combinations. This demo showcases the game's core cycle of planting, raising, hatching, and collecting.

title: Charades Universe Demo
description: Welcome to Charades Universe, a fun party game where players act out, sing, draw, or mime prompts shown on the screen while friends or teammates try to guess them. Inspired by classic charades.

title: Tiny Farm Big Money Together Demo
description: Up to 2-player co-op, physics-based resource management and production game.

title: Motelia Demo
description: A psychological horror game set in an old roadside motel. Clean the rooms, fix broken items, and deal with strange guests. Focus on your daily tasks while trying to keep your sanity.

title: PixelPop 2087 Demo
description: The Demo includes the first playable level for both characters.It also includes almost all the mechanics integrated in the final game, like the possibility to bought new weapons and the buff/debuff of the weapons.In the Demo is present the Arena Mode, playable for about 3 minutes, where you must survive to waves of enemies.

title: Stackmon Demo
description: Stack, train and collect powerful Stackmon in this creature-collector with a card-stacking twist! Build your camp, challenge rival Scouts in combat and face the mysterious corruption spreading throughout your land.

title: Ballatory Demo 0.9
description: The demo version of Ballatory, a short incremental idler where you build and upgrade a chaotic swarm of bouncing balls to destroy cores and earn crazy amounts of money.

title: Catnip Craze Demo
description: A bite-sized incremental idle game about cats, catnip, and numbers going up. Harvest catnip, hire cats, unlock production tiers, and prestige to witness the inevitable conclusion of the craze.

title: Cubepathy Demo
description: A simple, chill platformer in almost empty space. Nail the perfect jump - now help your friend without losing your progress. Made a mistake? Now your friend can help you out. Be a platform for your friends, pull them out of the void, help them jump higher.

title: Sutra Pilgrim Demo
description: Set out on a journey through Sutra Pilgrim！ Hone your skills, gather powerful Artifacts, meet steadfast allies, and challenge fearsome Yaoguai Kings. Traverse a vast mythic world inspired by Journey to the West, seek the Sutra Pilgrim, and uncover the hidden truth behind this westbound journey.

title: WHERE TO? Demo
description: Drive a late-night taxi through a city where no one can be trusted. Pick up suspicious passengers, follow unsettling routes, and face strange conversations and irreversible choices. Tonight, who you take, where you drop them off, and where you go next are all up to you. A retro horror taxi game.

title: Little Elementals Demo
description: A chaotic escape of little elementals who want to become human! The Fire Elemental and the Water Elemental secretly visit the human world…but get caught and thrown into prison! Who came to rescue them? Can they escapeand reach the human world? Join the little elementals on their adventure!

title: PaceBreak Demo
description: Pacebreak is a first-person parkour speedrunning game. Try the demo with 5 official maps and full leaderboard support!

title: SPRAWL zero Demo
description: SPRAWL zero is a fast-paced shooter inspired by the Golden Age of 2000s FPS. Survive a brutal cyberpunk city collapsing under military rule and cult fanaticism. Use your Gravity-Gloves, augments, and an arsenal of over 40 weapons to crush those who stand in your way.

title: LIGHT FORCE Demo
description: You are a speck of light. Charge to gather power, release to dash — momentum is everything. Master four arcade modes — Race, Dodge, Break, and Battle — across 40 hand-crafted levels, endless survival runs, 10 combat arenas, and online versus.

title: Pogo Froggo Demo
description: Two frogs, one bar, zero coordination. Bounce up the mountain before your tank breaks... and before you blame each other.

title: Giga Lich Demo
description: This is a single-player PvE extraction dungeon crawler where combat is king, and resources are limited. Explore the dungeon to utilize powerful equipment and souls-like combat to overcome the dungeon's guardians.

title: Into the End (of the World) Demo
description: Drive, maintain, and survive. Explore procedural biomes in a post-apocalyptic world, scavenge for parts, and fight infected zones with friends. Build your survival machine from the chassis up and keep it running - because without it, you won’t get far.

title: Hat Together (Demo)
description: Two players, two totally different sizes, one shared goal. Grab a friend, snatch up all the hats, and try not to throw each other into the abyss in the free demo of our cooperative platformer.

title: Lost Dude Demo
description: Lost Dude is an atmospheric 2D platform-adventure game that follows a character who sets out on a journey to find their lost friend, experiences various events along the way, and embarks on new adventures together after reuniting.

title: Rally TS Demo
description: Rally TS Demo - The Ultimate Auto Simulator Experience Embark on an epic journey through the world of rally racing in TS Rally, where your dream of becoming the #1 racer in the Race of Champions begins with a single street car and rise to the global championship glory.

title: Hardware Simulator Demo
description: Build your hardware empire from scratch! Experience real business with product sourcing, dynamic pricing, online orders, and delivery management. Boost your popularity, expand your store, and become the country's most successful hardware merchant!

title: Spreadsheets & Dungeons Demo
description: A grid-based turn-based roguelike where you manage a party across a dungeon which is a spreadsheet. Explore each dungeon, level up your heroes, build synergies, scale absurd stats, and survive escalating dungeon pressure through tactical positioning and resource management.

title: Idle Aqua Driller Demo
description: Dive into the depths of the first four platforms of an offshore drilling rig and develop underwater resource extraction! Manage drilling rigs, hire divers, and send submarines to new levels. Unlock increasingly valuable layers, upgrade decks, and improve extraction speed and team efficiency.

title: A Rhapsody In Steam Demo
description: The expedition against the Dark Lord is long delayed, but the railway keeps pushing north. You ride as the Hero's advisor. The carriage is your transport — and your home. People along the way come to recognize you. Marks pile up on the walls. The Dark Lord is still in the north. The road is long.

title: Pawns Revenge Demo
description: The rules on the chessboard have changed! Start as a single pawn, gather roguelike abilities, and take your revenge on the Queen by defeating powerful pieces. Plan your moves wisely, it's your turn to checkmate!

title: Survivors: Become an Immortal DEMO
description: DEMO of [ Survivors: Become an Immortal ]

title: How To Destroy A City Demo
description: How to Destroy a City is a casual incremental game where you pilot a giant robot to destroy the city. Upgrade your robot, fight the army, and unlock special abilities and new robots. It's time to turn the city to ashes!

title: Interstellar Inn Demo
description: Interstellar Inn is a 2D hotel building and management sim in space. - DEMO -

title: MAGISTAL Demo
description: MAGISTAL is a strategic board game where you battle by developing units on the board. Units level up in the order that magic energy is accumulated! Move your units and attack your opponent with arts. The first to destroy a certain number of your opponent's units wins!

title: Knuckle Creek Demo
description: Knuckle Creek is a slapstick comedy brawler designed for friends, fun and light-hearted play sessions.

title: Keyboard Smash Demo
description: Why hello there, sir. I’m the newsboy! In this story game you run your little shop, help strange customers, and explore so many places, and probably tick people off too!

title: Duskvein Survivors - Bloodline Demo
description: Duskvein Survivors – Bloodline is a dark fantasy bullet-heaven roguelite where you fight through cursed arenas, harvest bloodline powers, and push deeper through portals into deadlier realms.

title: Link Empire Demo
description: Link Empire is a real-time strategy game based on a hexagonal grid. In this game, you just need to link nodes to command your forces, not control every unit. Focus on your development, unit combination. Choose your attack timing and path carefully. Defeat your enemies on a truly strategic level!

title: Kaido Genkai: An Anime Racing RPG Demo
description: Kaido Genkai is an open-world racing exploration game that blends the excitement of high-speed races with the charm of anime-style graphics and RPG elements, set in a nostalgic 90's fictional Japanese countryside. Come explore the open world and see who you meet along the way!

title: Lantern Lane Demo
description: A roguelite management game blending deckbuilding and shop sim elements. Recruit workers, arrange buildings, craft powerful builds, and maximise profit each run.

title: 我的傲娇妹妹 MY TSUNDERE SISTER Demo
description: 《我的高冷女友》续作来袭！与红发双马尾傲娇妹妹同住一屋，体验嘴硬心软的日常守护，解锁夏日限定的甜蜜与感动。DEMO包含最初的约20分钟时长的剧情体验，期待您的试玩！

title: Hidden Cats and Van Gogh Demo
description: Welcome to Van Gogh's art world! The playful cats have hidden a lovely adventure for you among the swirling stars and golden sunflower fields. Follow the clues from Van Gogh's mysterious outing and start this relaxing journey!

title: Space Wander Navigator Project Demo
description: 《领航员计划》是一款有美少女养成互动要素的弹幕射击肉鸽游戏，Roguelike刷宝玩法，数百种BUFF、武器、舰船、技能自由搭配！

title: 幻想郷大激突 : Touhou Impact Demo
